message:
feat(core): implement CREATE TABLE AS SELECT (bd-1v1w)

Execute the SELECT query, infer column names from result columns,
create the table schema, and populate it with the result rows.
Handles empty result sets, expression aliases, and all SELECT
features (WHERE, ORDER BY, etc.).

3 tests: basic CTAS, empty result set, expression-based columns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
